projects.title: SmartPredict AI
projects.description: Machine learning platform for predictive analytics using neural networks. Provides real-time predictions with 95% accuracy for business forecasting and trend analysis.
projects.codeSnippet:
model = Sequential([
  Dense(128, activation='relu'),
  Dropout(0.3),
  Dense(64, activation='relu'),
  Dense(1, activation='sigmoid')
])

projects.title: ImageClassify Pro
projects.description: Deep learning image classification system using CNN architecture. Trained on 100K+ images with transfer learning for accurate object detection and recognition.

projects.title: NLP Sentiment Analyzer
projects.description: Natural language processing tool for sentiment analysis and text classification. Processes customer reviews and social media data with BERT-based models.
projects.codeSnippet:
from transformers import pipeline

sentiment = pipeline(
  'sentiment-analysis'
)
result = sentiment(
  'This product is amazing!'
)

projects.title: E-Commerce Hub
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, secure payments via Stripe, and admin dashboard. Built with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO.

projects.title: Portfolio CMS
projects.description: Headless content management system with drag-and-drop builder. API-first architecture for multi-channel content delivery with GraphQL support.
projects.codeSnippet:
const content = await cms
  .collection('portfolio')
  .where('published', true)
  .populate('author')
  .sort({ date: -1 })
  .limit(10);

projects.title: Real-Time Chat App
projects.description: WebSocket-based real-time messaging platform with end-to-end encryption. Supports group chats, file sharing, and video calls with WebRTC integration.

projects.title: FitTrack Mobile
projects.description: Cross-platform fitness tracking app with workout plans, calorie counter, and progress analytics. Syncs with wearable devices via Bluetooth.

projects.title: FoodDelivery App
projects.description: On-demand food delivery mobile application with real-time order tracking, payment integration, and restaurant management system.

projects.title: TaskManager Pro
projects.description: Productivity mobile app for task management with offline support, push notifications, and team collaboration features. Built with native performance.
